entry.title: Tyga Proves Pop Smoke Approved Of His Collaboration & Karol G-Assisted ‘Enjoy Yourself’

For over 17 years, HipHopDX has been at the forefront of Hip Hop culture online, featuring over 2.7 million readers per month. As one of the longest-standing Hip Hop websites, DX not only stays current on Hip Hop culture, but continues to influence it, encourage it, and simultaneously reflect on its past. Our insightful, honest editorials, unbiased reviews, premier audio and video sections, and original video content, draws one of the most loyal followings online. Check us out at

entry.title: Bubba Wallace: 5 Things To Know About The NASCAR Driver

link.title: Bubba Wallace: 5 Things To Know About The NASCAR Driver

entry.content: Bubba Wallace made headlines on June 21, when NASCAR received reports a noose had been found in his garage stall at Talladega Superspeedway in Lincoln, Alabama. Here are five things to know about NASCAR’s only Black driver.Music Credit: FMA ‘Broke For Free 05 - Note Drop’
entry.summary: Bubba Wallace made headlines on June 21, when NASCAR received reports a noose had been found in his garage stall at Talladega Superspeedway in Lincoln, Alabama. Here are five things to know about NASCAR’s only Black driver.Music Credit: FMA ‘Broke For Free 05 - Note Drop’

entry.title: Liebe Kinder! Die Masken sind Quatsch. Die Regierung hat gelogen. Von Batseba N’Diaye

link.title: Liebe Kinder! Die Masken sind Quatsch. Die Regierung hat gelogen. Von Batseba N’Diaye

entry.content:
Den vollständigen Standpunkte-Text (inkl ggf. Quellenhinweisen und Links) findet ihr hier:
Ein Standpunkt von Batseba N’Diaye, Herausgeberin der Wochenzeitung Demokratischer Widerstand
Die Erwachsenen haben gerade Streit. Die Regierung und ein paar mächtige Wirtschaftsbosse sagen: "Alle müssen große Angst haben! Der Virus ist sehr gefährlich für Euch alle! Wir bestimmen jetzt, was mit Euren Körpern gemacht wird!"
"Nein!", sagen dagegen die besten Ärzte der Welt. Sie sagen: "Der Virus ist nicht neuartig und auch nicht gefährlicher als eine Grippe. Die Masken sind ekelig und nutzlos. Die Einschränkungen sind fast alle unberechtigt!"
Das weiß auch die Regierung. Und auch die meisten Erwachsenen in unserem Land wissen es. Aber sie haben Angst, große Angst vor der Regierung und den großen Bossen. … weiterlesen hier:
+++
Jetzt KenFM unterstützen:
Dir gefällt unser Programm? Informationen zu weiteren Unterstützungsmöglichkeiten hier:
Du kannst uns auch mit Bitcoins unterstützen.
BitCoin-Adresse: 18FpEnH1Dh83GXXGpRNqSoW5TL1z1PZgZK
+++
Abonniere jetzt den KenFM-Newsletter:
+++
KenFM jetzt auch als kostenlose App für Android- und iOS-Geräte verfügbar! Über unsere Homepage kommt Ihr zu den Stores von Apple und Google. Hier der Link:
+++
Website und Social Media:
+++
Bestelle Deine Bücher bei unserem Partner:
entry.summary: Den vollständigen Standpunkte-Text (inkl ggf. Quellenhinweisen und Links) findet ihr hier: Ein Standpunkt von Batseba N’Diaye, Herausgeberin der Wochenzeitung Demokratischer Widerstand Die Erwachsenen haben gerade Streit. Die Regierung und ein paar mächtige Wirtschaftsbosse sagen: "Alle müssen große Angst haben! Der Virus ist sehr gefährlich für Euch alle! Wir bestimmen jetzt, was mit Euren Körpern gemacht wird!" "Nein!", sagen dagegen die besten Ärzte der Welt. Sie sagen: "Der Virus ist nicht neuartig und auch nicht gefährlicher als eine Grippe. Die Masken sind ekelig und nutzlos. Die Einschränkungen sind fast alle unberechtigt!" Das weiß auch die Regierung. Und auch die meisten Erwachsenen in unserem Land wissen es. Aber sie haben Angst, große Angst vor der Regierung und den großen Bossen. … weiterlesen hier: +++ Jetzt KenFM unterstützen: Dir gefällt unser Programm? Informationen zu weiteren Unterstützungsmöglichkeiten hier: Du kannst uns auch mit Bitcoins unterstützen. BitCoin-Adresse: 18FpEnH1Dh83GXXGpRNqSoW5TL1z1PZgZK +++ Abonniere jetzt den KenFM-Newsletter: +++ KenFM jetzt auch als kostenlose App für Android- und iOS-Geräte verfügbar! Über unsere Homepage kommt Ihr zu den Stores von Apple und Google. Hier der Link: +++ Website und Social Media: +++ Bestelle Deine Bücher bei unserem Partner:

entry.title: Facebook brings a new Update to reduce sharing of Fake news Oneindia Kannada

link.title: Facebook brings a new Update to reduce sharing of Fake news Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
ಇನ್ಮುಂದೆ ಫೇಸ್ ಬುಕ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ ಫೇಕ್ ಸುದ್ದಿ ಹೊರಡೋದು ಕಡಿಮೆಯಾಗಬಹುದು . ಸುಳ್ಳು ಸುದ್ದಿಗಳಿಗೆ ಕಡಿವಾಣ ಹಾಕುವ ನಿಟ್ಟಿನಲ್ಲಿ ಫೇಸ್ ಬುಕ್ ಹೊಸದೊಂದು ಅಪ್ಡೇಟ್ ಮಾಡಿದೆ.
Facebook has recently come up with a new update which verifies the originality of the content and prioritizes it according to it’soriginality
entry.summary: ಇನ್ಮುಂದೆ ಫೇಸ್ ಬುಕ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ ಫೇಕ್ ಸುದ್ದಿ ಹೊರಡೋದು ಕಡಿಮೆಯಾಗಬಹುದು . ಸುಳ್ಳು ಸುದ್ದಿಗಳಿಗೆ ಕಡಿವಾಣ ಹಾಕುವ ನಿಟ್ಟಿನಲ್ಲಿ ಫೇಸ್ ಬುಕ್ ಹೊಸದೊಂದು ಅಪ್ಡೇಟ್ ಮಾಡಿದೆ. Facebook has recently come up with a new update which verifies the originality of the content and prioritizes it according to it’soriginality

entry.title: Laurey : «Je ne semble pas malheureux, non ?» - Foot - L1 - Strasbourg

link.title: Laurey : «Je ne semble pas malheureux, non ?» - Foot - L1 - Strasbourg

entry.content: VIDÉO LIGUE 1 - Thierry Laurey, l’entraîneur du RC Strasbourg, évoque sa prolongation de contrat et fait le point sur la situation de son effectif ce lundi, pour la reprise du club alsacien.
entry.summary: VIDÉO LIGUE 1 - Thierry Laurey, l’entraîneur du RC Strasbourg, évoque sa prolongation de contrat et fait le point sur la situation de son effectif ce lundi, pour la reprise du club alsacien.

entry.title: Coronavirus : WHO ने आखिरकार माना ही लिया , कोरोना का संक्रमण हवा से भी फैलता है वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Coronavirus : WHO ने आखिरकार माना ही लिया , कोरोना का संक्रमण हवा से भी फैलता है वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The World Health Organization (WHO) has made a new disclosure regarding the corona virus. The World Health Organization finally acknowledged on Tuesday that some evidence of corona virus infection from ‘spreading through the air’ has been found
कोरोना वायरस को लेकर विश्व स्वास्थ्य संगठन यानि WHO ने नया खुलासा किया है। विश्व स्वास्थ्य संगठन ने आख़िरकार मंगलवार को ये मान ही लिया कि कोरोना वायरस संक्रमण के ‘हवा से फैलने’ से फैलने के कुछ सबूत मिले हैं
#CoronavirusAirborne #Coronavirus #Covid19Airborne
entry.summary: The World Health Organization (WHO) has made a new disclosure regarding the corona virus. The World Health Organization finally acknowledged on Tuesday that some evidence of corona virus infection from ‘spreading through the air’ has been found कोरोना वायरस को लेकर विश्व स्वास्थ्य संगठन यानि WHO ने नया खुलासा किया है। विश्व स्वास्थ्य संगठन ने आख़िरकार मंगलवार को ये मान ही लिया कि कोरोना वायरस संक्रमण के ‘हवा से फैलने’ से फैलने के कुछ सबूत मिले हैं #CoronavirusAirborne #Coronavirus #Covid19Airborne

entry.title: Aditya Chopra ने ऐसे निकाला था Puneet को Film से बाहर Exclusively FilmiBeat

link.title: Aditya Chopra ने ऐसे निकाला था Puneet को Film से बाहर Exclusively FilmiBeat

entry.content:
Actor Puneet Vashist open up about all the aspect in bollywood from Nepotism to groupism, to casting couch to gangism and more check it out what actor has to say Exclusively on Filmibeat check it out
#YehJawaaniHaiDewaani #AdityaChopra #PuneetVaishist
entry.summary: Actor Puneet Vashist open up about all the aspect in bollywood from Nepotism to groupism, to casting couch to gangism and more check it out what actor has to say Exclusively on Filmibeat check it out #YehJawaaniHaiDewaani #AdityaChopra #PuneetVaishist

entry.title: Couple Pulls Guns On Protesters Cutting Through Their Private Neighborhood

link.title: Couple Pulls Guns On Protesters Cutting Through Their Private Neighborhood

entry.content:
A group of protesters in St. Louis walked on a private street on Sunday to demonstrate outside the mayor’s home.
The protesters opposed Mayor Lyda Krewson’s decision to publish the names and addresses of people in favor of police reform.
According to CNN, two armed individuals came out of a home near the mayor’s house, brandishing weapons as the protesters walked by.
Videos show Mark McCloskey armed with a long rifle, and spouse Patricia McCloskey with a handgun, in a tense standoff lasting roughly ten minutes.
The couple says that while they supported the protesters, they were responding to some of them who threatened their lives.
Police are investigating the incident. On Friday, the mayor apologized on Twitter, saying she didn’t mean to hurt anyone.
entry.summary: A group of protesters in St. Louis walked on a private street on Sunday to demonstrate outside the mayor’s home. The protesters opposed Mayor Lyda Krewson’s decision to publish the names and addresses of people in favor of police reform. According to CNN, two armed individuals came out of a home near the mayor’s house, brandishing weapons as the protesters walked by. Videos show Mark McCloskey armed with a long rifle, and spouse Patricia McCloskey with a handgun, in a tense standoff lasting roughly ten minutes. The couple says that while they supported the protesters, they were responding to some of them who threatened their lives. Police are investigating the incident. On Friday, the mayor apologized on Twitter, saying she didn’t mean to hurt anyone.

entry.title: Denuncian dos encapuchados robaron valija al presidente y al secretario de un colegio electoral en Barahona

link.title: Denuncian dos encapuchados robaron valija al presidente y al secretario de un colegio electoral en Barahona

entry.content: Luis Antonio Sánchez y Robert Ramírez, presidente y secretarios del colegio 0070, que funciona en la escuela Cristo Rey de esta ciudad de Barahona (sur del pa), denunciaron que fueron asaltados por dos hombres encapuchados, en una motocicleta, y los despojaron de la valija con los materiales de votación y unos 20 mil pesos que eran destinados para el pago de los demás miembros del colegios.
entry.summary: Luis Antonio Sánchez y Robert Ramírez, presidente y secretarios del colegio 0070, que funciona en la escuela Cristo Rey de esta ciudad de Barahona (sur del pa), denunciaron que fueron asaltados por dos hombres encapuchados, en una motocicleta, y los despojaron de la valija con los materiales de votación y unos 20 mil pesos que eran destinados para el pago de los demás miembros del colegios.

entry.title: The Politics of the Supreme Court

link.title: The Politics of the Supreme Court

entry.content:
In 2016, Republicans and
Democrats were not only
battling for the presidency,
a spot on the Supreme Court was also on the line.
Troy Slaten
"The Supreme Court picks that a
President makes can have long
lasting implications."
The court has always touted. It’s
apolitical nature. However,
justices are selected because
of their conservative or liberal record.
Troy Slaten
"Trump’s Supreme Court picks have
solidified a conservative
majority for possibly the
next generation or so."
00:27.250 –> 00:31.650
However, recent rulings have put
that conservative certainty into question.
Chief Justice Roberts, siding
with more liberal justices to
rule against Louisiana’s
abortion law. And in a 6-3
decision, the court ruling
LGBTQ+ people are protected
from discrimination, with
Justice Gorsuch even writing
the opinion. President Trump
was not happy with the
decision. Rulings on the
president’s own taxes, birth
control and Obamacare
exceptions and religious
schools are expected this
month.
Matt Klink
It is not about politics, it’s about the law
and the interpretation of the law."
This isn’t the first
time a sitting president has
been surprised by his
appointees. Justice Sandra Day O’Connor
was nominated to
the court by President Reagan
and then upheld rulings for
abortion rights. Now, many
court experts say Roberts is
shifting into the traditional
swing vote role, famously held
for so long by retired Justice Kennedy.
Matt Klink
"Conservative judges and justices that are
confirmed don’t always vote conservatively, and the same
holds with liberals. And, that’s
what makes the Supreme
Court such a fantastic
institution."
With talk of Justice Thomas retiring and
Justices: Ginsberg and Bryer
aging, the balance of the
Supreme Court is again in the
hands of a presidential election.
In 2016, Republicans and
Democrats were not only
battling for the presidency,
a spot on the Supreme Court was also on the line.
Troy Slaten
"The Supreme Court picks that a
President makes can have long
lasting implications."
The court has always touted. It’s
apolitical nature. However,
justices are selected because
of their conservative or liberal record.
Troy Slaten
"Trump’s Supreme Court picks have
solidified a conservative
majority for possibly the
next generation or so."
00:27.250 –> 00:31.650
However, recent rulings have put
that conservative certainty into question.
Chief Justice Roberts, siding
with more liberal justices to
rule against Louisiana’s
abortion law. And in a 6-3
decision, the court ruling
LGBTQ+ people are protected
from discrimination, with
Justice Gorsuch even writing
the opinion. President Trump
was not happy with the
decision. Rulings on the
president’s own taxes, birth
control and Obamacare
exceptions and religious
schools are expected this
month.
Matt Klink
It is not about politics, it’s about the law
and the interpretation of the law."
This isn’t the first
time a sitting president has
been surprised by his
appointees. Justice Sandra Day O’Connor
was nominated to
the court by President Reagan
and then upheld rulings for
abortion rights. Now, many
court experts say Roberts is
shifting into the traditional
swing vote role, famously held
for so long by retired Justice Kennedy.
Matt Klink
"Conservative judges and justices that are
confirmed don’t always vote conservatively, and the same
holds with liberals. And, that’s
what makes the Supreme
Court such a fantastic
institution."
With talk of Justice Thomas retiring and
Justices: Ginsberg and Bryer
aging, the balance of the
Supreme Court is again in the
hands of a presidential election.
entry.summary: In 2016, Republicans and Democrats were not only battling for the presidency, a spot on the Supreme Court was also on the line. Troy Slaten "The Supreme Court picks that a President makes can have long lasting implications." The court has always touted. It’s apolitical nature. However, justices are selected because of their conservative or liberal record. Troy Slaten "Trump’s Supreme Court picks have solidified a conservative majority for possibly the next generation or so." 00:27.250 –> 00:31.650 However, recent rulings have put that conservative certainty into question. Chief Justice Roberts, siding with more liberal justices to rule against Louisiana’s abortion law. And in a 6-3 decision, the court ruling LGBTQ+ people are protected from discrimination, with Justice Gorsuch even writing the opinion. President Trump was not happy with the decision. Rulings on the president’s own taxes, birth control and Obamacare exceptions and religious schools are expected this month. Matt Klink It is not about politics, it’s about the law and the interpretation of the law." This isn’t the first time a sitting president has been surprised by his appointees. Justice Sandra Day O’Connor was nominated to the court by President Reagan and then upheld rulings for abortion rights. Now, many court experts say Roberts is shifting into the traditional swing vote role, famously held for so long by retired Justice Kennedy. Matt Klink "Conservative judges and justices that are confirmed don’t always vote conservatively, and the same holds with liberals. And, that’s what makes the Supreme Court such a fantastic institution." With talk of Justice Thomas retiring and Justices: Ginsberg and Bryer aging, the balance of the Supreme Court is again in the hands of a presidential election. In 2016, Republicans and Democrats were not only battling for the presidency, a spot on the Supreme Court was also on the line. Troy Slaten "The Supreme Court picks that a President makes can have long lasting implications." The court has always touted. It’s apolitical nature. However, justices are selected because of their conservative or liberal record. Troy Slaten "Trump’s Supreme Court picks have solidified a conservative majority for possibly the next generation or so." 00:27.250 –> 00:31.650 However, recent rulings have put that conservative certainty into question. Chief Justice Roberts, siding with more liberal justices to rule against Louisiana’s abortion law. And in a 6-3 decision, the court ruling LGBTQ+ people are protected from discrimination, with Justice Gorsuch even writing the opinion. President Trump was not happy with the decision. Rulings on the president’s own taxes, birth control and Obamacare exceptions and religious schools are expected this month. Matt Klink It is not about politics, it’s about the law and the interpretation of the law." This isn’t the first time a sitting president has been surprised by his appointees. Justice Sandra Day O’Connor was nominated to the court by President Reagan and then upheld rulings for abortion rights. Now, many court experts say Roberts is shifting into the traditional swing vote role, famously held for so long by retired Justice Kennedy. Matt Klink "Conservative judges and justices that are confirmed don’t always vote conservatively, and the same holds with liberals. And, that’s what makes the Supreme Court such a fantastic institution." With talk of Justice Thomas retiring and Justices: Ginsberg and Bryer aging, the balance of the Supreme Court is again in the hands of a presidential election.

entry.title: In Fabric - Trailer subtitulado en español (HD)

link.title: In Fabric - Trailer subtitulado en español (HD)

entry.content:
Más info
- TWITTER:
- FACEBOOK:
- INSTAGRAM:
- TELEGRAM:
Sinopsis: Son rebajas en unos grandes almacenes ingleses, Sheila observa las estanterías, y, de repente, un vestido rojo sangre de seda la hipnotiza. Ya no hay nada que ella quiera salvo ese vestido, nada salvo acariciarlo, examinarlo, adorarlo… Lo que Sheila no sabe es que pesa una maldición sobre cada persona que ha poseído ese vestido y comprarlo traerá devastadoras consecuencias
Director: Peter Strickland
Reparto: Marianne Jean-Baptiste, Sidse Babett Knudsen, Caroline Catz, Julian Barratt, Gwendoline Christie, Hayley Squires, Leo Bill, Richard Bremmer, Steve Oram, Susanna Cappellaro
(El trailer pertenece a la productora y distribuidora de la película y ha sido subido sin ánimo de lucro)
entry.summary: Más info - TWITTER: - FACEBOOK: - INSTAGRAM: - TELEGRAM: Sinopsis: Son rebajas en unos grandes almacenes ingleses, Sheila observa las estanterías, y, de repente, un vestido rojo sangre de seda la hipnotiza. Ya no hay nada que ella quiera salvo ese vestido, nada salvo acariciarlo, examinarlo, adorarlo… Lo que Sheila no sabe es que pesa una maldición sobre cada persona que ha poseído ese vestido y comprarlo traerá devastadoras consecuencias Director: Peter Strickland Reparto: Marianne Jean-Baptiste, Sidse Babett Knudsen, Caroline Catz, Julian Barratt, Gwendoline Christie, Hayley Squires, Leo Bill, Richard Bremmer, Steve Oram, Susanna Cappellaro (El trailer pertenece a la productora y distribuidora de la película y ha sido subido sin ánimo de lucro)

entry.title: Affaire Fillon : « Je n’ai reçu aucune instruction », assure la procureure générale de Paris

link.title: Affaire Fillon : « Je n’ai reçu aucune instruction », assure la procureure générale de Paris

entry.content: Catherine Champrenault l’a martelé, jeudi 2 juillet, devant la commission d’enquête de l’Assemblée nationale sur l’indépendance de la justice : « Je n’ai reçu dans l’affaire Fillon, comme dans tous les autres dossiers relevant de mon contrôle hiérarchique, aucune instruction de la Direction des affaires criminelles et des grâces (DACG), aucune instruction du pouvoir exécutif et […] je n’ai jamais relayé une demande du garde des Sceaux ou du pouvoir exécutif pour influer sur une procédure. » Une déclaration qui fait suite aux propos de l’ex-cheffe du Parquet national financier (PNF) Éliane Houlette qui ont suscité des accusations d’« instrumentalisation » de la justice.
entry.summary: Catherine Champrenault l’a martelé, jeudi 2 juillet, devant la commission d’enquête de l’Assemblée nationale sur l’indépendance de la justice : « Je n’ai reçu dans l’affaire Fillon, comme dans tous les autres dossiers relevant de mon contrôle hiérarchique, aucune instruction de la Direction des affaires criminelles et des grâces (DACG), aucune instruction du pouvoir exécutif et […] je n’ai jamais relayé une demande du garde des Sceaux ou du pouvoir exécutif pour influer sur une procédure. » Une déclaration qui fait suite aux propos de l’ex-cheffe du Parquet national financier (PNF) Éliane Houlette qui ont suscité des accusations d’« instrumentalisation » de la justice.

entry.title: Covid-19: Functioning of Delhi HC restricted till July 15th Oneindia News

link.title: Covid-19: Functioning of Delhi HC restricted till July 15th Oneindia News

entry.content: The Delhi High Court has decided to restrict its functioning as also of the district courts to urgent matters only till July 15, in view of the prevalent COVID-19 pandemic situation. According to reports, India is likely to receive around six fully-loaded Rafale fighter aircraft by July-end , which is expected to boost the capabilities of the Indian Air Force. The Centre has been asked to respond to a bunch of petitions challenging its order to blacklist more than 3,500 citizens of 35 nations for their alleged involvement in Tablighi Jamaat activities. The Maharashtra government has extended the coronavirus lockdown till July 31 amid a steady growth in the COVID-19 numbers in the state. Issuing fresh guidelines for what it called ‘Mission Begin Again
entry.summary: The Delhi High Court has decided to restrict its functioning as also of the district courts to urgent matters only till July 15, in view of the prevalent COVID-19 pandemic situation. According to reports, India is likely to receive around six fully-loaded Rafale fighter aircraft by July-end , which is expected to boost the capabilities of the Indian Air Force. The Centre has been asked to respond to a bunch of petitions challenging its order to blacklist more than 3,500 citizens of 35 nations for their alleged involvement in Tablighi Jamaat activities. The Maharashtra government has extended the coronavirus lockdown till July 31 amid a steady growth in the COVID-19 numbers in the state. Issuing fresh guidelines for what it called ‘Mission Begin Again

entry.title: Bihar में Jaish-e-Mohammed के Terrorist घुसने की खबर, High Alert वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Bihar में Jaish-e-Mohammed के Terrorist घुसने की खबर, High Alert वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Jaish-e-Mohammed’s 6 terrorists have entered the country through Nepal border. The SP of Special Branch has issued an alert to almost all the districts of North Bihar including Muzaffarpur. It has been mentioned in the alert that more than 6 Jaish-e-Mohammed terrorists have entered Bihar through Nepal. All entered the state are trained with Pakistani Army.
नेपाल बॉर्डर के रास्ते जैश ए मोहम्मद के 6 आतंकियों के देश में दाखिल होने की जानकारी मिली है। स्पेशल ब्रांच के एसपी ने मुजफ्फरपुर सहित उत्तर बिहार के लगभग सभी जिलों को एक अलर्ट जारी किया है। अलर्ट में इस बात का जिक्र किया गया है कि नेपाल के रास्ते बिहार में जैश-ए-मोहम्मद के 6 से अधिक आतंकी दाखिल हुए हैं। प्रदेश में घुसे सभी पाकिस्तानी सेना से प्रशिक्षित हैं।
#IndoNepalBorder #HighAlertInBihar #Terrorist
entry.summary: Jaish-e-Mohammed’s 6 terrorists have entered the country through Nepal border. The SP of Special Branch has issued an alert to almost all the districts of North Bihar including Muzaffarpur. It has been mentioned in the alert that more than 6 Jaish-e-Mohammed terrorists have entered Bihar through Nepal. All entered the state are trained with Pakistani Army. नेपाल बॉर्डर के रास्ते जैश ए मोहम्मद के 6 आतंकियों के देश में दाखिल होने की जानकारी मिली है। स्पेशल ब्रांच के एसपी ने मुजफ्फरपुर सहित उत्तर बिहार के लगभग सभी जिलों को एक अलर्ट जारी किया है। अलर्ट में इस बात का जिक्र किया गया है कि नेपाल के रास्ते बिहार में जैश-ए-मोहम्मद के 6 से अधिक आतंकी दाखिल हुए हैं। प्रदेश में घुसे सभी पाकिस्तानी सेना से प्रशिक्षित हैं। #IndoNepalBorder #HighAlertInBihar #Terrorist

entry.title: Life in lockdown: Covid-19, BLM and inequality in east London – video

link.title: Life in lockdown: Covid-19, BLM and inequality in east London – video

entry.content: As people emerge into a changed reality, the Anywhere But Westminster team focuses on east London, where Covid-19 has fused with the Black Lives Matter movement and huge injustices are impossible to ignore. Young people in particular are agreed: there’s no going back to the world of 12 weeks ago.
entry.summary: As people emerge into a changed reality, the Anywhere But Westminster team focuses on east London, where Covid-19 has fused with the Black Lives Matter movement and huge injustices are impossible to ignore. Young people in particular are agreed: there’s no going back to the world of 12 weeks ago.

entry.title: Covid superspreader wedding in Bihar: Groom dead, 111 guests test positive Oneindia News

link.title: Covid superspreader wedding in Bihar: Groom dead, 111 guests test positive Oneindia News

entry.content:
Banned Chinese apps to clarify on data-sharing law; 1 jawan, civilian dead in terrorist attack in J&K’s Sopore; Transfers in Tamil Nadu police after outrage over custodial deaths of Jayaraj and Fenix; Bihar groom dead, over 100 guests test Covid positive; Nepal’s ruling party seeks PM Oli’s resignation over remarks on India; Patanjali says ‘never claimed to cure Covid’ with Coronil; Lalbaugcha Raja to skip grand Ganeshotsav, hold plasma & blood donation camp instead and more news
#Sopore #BabaRamdev #PMModi
entry.summary: Banned Chinese apps to clarify on data-sharing law; 1 jawan, civilian dead in terrorist attack in J&K’s Sopore; Transfers in Tamil Nadu police after outrage over custodial deaths of Jayaraj and Fenix; Bihar groom dead, over 100 guests test Covid positive; Nepal’s ruling party seeks PM Oli’s resignation over remarks on India; Patanjali says ‘never claimed to cure Covid’ with Coronil; Lalbaugcha Raja to skip grand Ganeshotsav, hold plasma & blood donation camp instead and more news #Sopore #BabaRamdev #PMModi

entry.title: fibre optic cable 8 தீவுகள் உடன் சென்னையை இணைக்க திட்டம்

link.title: fibre optic cable 8 தீவுகள் உடன் சென்னையை இணைக்க திட்டம்

entry.content:
fibre optic cable plan: Chennai will get connected with 8 Islands
சென்னையை கடலுக்கு அடியில் 8 தீவுகள் உடன் இணைக்கும் புதிய திட்டம் ஒன்றுக்கு மத்திய அரசு அனுமதி அளித்துள்ளது.
entry.summary: fibre optic cable plan: Chennai will get connected with 8 Islands சென்னையை கடலுக்கு அடியில் 8 தீவுகள் உடன் இணைக்கும் புதிய திட்டம் ஒன்றுக்கு மத்திய அரசு அனுமதி அளித்துள்ளது.

entry.title: [INTEGRAL] Audition d’Agnès Buzyn sur la gestion de la crise du Covid-19 devant la commission d’enquête de l’Assemblée nationale

link.title: [INTEGRAL] Audition d’Agnès Buzyn sur la gestion de la crise du Covid-19 devant la commission d’enquête de l’Assemblée nationale

entry.content: audition de Mme Agnès BUZYN, ancienne ministre des Solidarités et de la Santé devant la Mission d’information sur l’impact, la gestion et les conséquences de l’épidémie de Coronavirus-Covid 19 de l’Assemblée nationale
entry.summary: audition de Mme Agnès BUZYN, ancienne ministre des Solidarités et de la Santé devant la Mission d’information sur l’impact, la gestion et les conséquences de l’épidémie de Coronavirus-Covid 19 de l’Assemblée nationale

entry.title: Kate et William : ce ‘terrible traumatisme’ qui pèse sur une de leur future décision pour leurs enfants

link.title: Kate et William : ce ‘terrible traumatisme’ qui pèse sur une de leur future décision pour leurs enfants

entry.content: Pour Kate Middleton et le prince William, rien n’est plus important que leurs enfants. Parents comblés de George, Charlotte et Louis , les Cambridge ont profité du confinement qu’ils ont passé à Anmer Hall pour passer du temps en famille. Ils ont fêté l’anniversaire du duc et partagé de bons moments. Selon Ingrid Stewart, il est probable que Kate Middleton et le prince William favorisent l’option de l’internat, pour protéger leur fils aîné de la pression de son rang . Les frères ont adoré leur séjour à l’école, contrairement à leur père. Charles a fréquenté Gordonstoun en Écosse conformément aux souhaits de son père le prince Philip. Le père de William qui décrivait cette expérience comme "désastreuse" . Cependant, Ingrid Stewart note également que les enfants des Cambridge semblent avoir des personnalités bien différentes Ingrid Stewart
entry.summary: Pour Kate Middleton et le prince William, rien n’est plus important que leurs enfants. Parents comblés de George, Charlotte et Louis , les Cambridge ont profité du confinement qu’ils ont passé à Anmer Hall pour passer du temps en famille. Ils ont fêté l’anniversaire du duc et partagé de bons moments. Selon Ingrid Stewart, il est probable que Kate Middleton et le prince William favorisent l’option de l’internat, pour protéger leur fils aîné de la pression de son rang . Les frères ont adoré leur séjour à l’école, contrairement à leur père. Charles a fréquenté Gordonstoun en Écosse conformément aux souhaits de son père le prince Philip. Le père de William qui décrivait cette expérience comme "désastreuse" . Cependant, Ingrid Stewart note également que les enfants des Cambridge semblent avoir des personnalités bien différentes Ingrid Stewart

entry.title: Investigation into man’s ‘unexplained’ death outside Seaham house continue

link.title: Investigation into man’s ‘unexplained’ death outside Seaham house continue

entry.content: The emergency services were called Marlborough in Seaham on the morning of Wednesday, July 1, after a man was found injured, with police later confirming he had died at the scene.
entry.summary: The emergency services were called Marlborough in Seaham on the morning of Wednesday, July 1, after a man was found injured, with police later confirming he had died at the scene.

entry.title: Employers, WFH employees should agree on cost-sharing deal —DOLE

link.title: Employers, WFH employees should agree on cost-sharing deal —DOLE

entry.content: #Agenda Employers should shoulder additional expenses of employees in work from home arrangements, according to Labor Usec. Benjo Benavidez.
entry.summary: #Agenda Employers should shoulder additional expenses of employees in work from home arrangements, according to Labor Usec. Benjo Benavidez.
